name: Ameritrust Corporation
summary: Ameritrust Corporation does not have significant operations. It focuses on acquiring, holding, developing, and operating commercial real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Gryphon Resources, Inc. and changed its name to Ameritrust Corporation in August 2020. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Cheyenne, Wyoming. Ameritrust Corporation is a subsidiary of Tourmeline Ventures, Inc.
